name: Universal AI Memory
description: Chrome extension + Hub + Vault system for persistent AI conversation memory across Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini
context: Infrastructure: DO droplet 4GB RAM ($24/mo), Ubuntu 24.04, NYC3
Services: Hub (anr-hub-bridge), Vault API (anr-vault-api), PostgreSQL (anr-vault-db), Caddy proxy
Tech Stack: FastAPI backend (Python), Chrome Manifest V3, PostgreSQL, Docker
Phase 1: Capture-only MVP (no embeddings yet, just storage)
Goal: 100 conversation turns captured from 3 sites with 0% loss

standards.approach: sim/test/verify - simulate, test, verify before implementing
standards.pricing: Always provide exact costs, never handwave
standards.architecture: Build on existing spine (Hub + Vault), avoid vendor lock-in
